name: Notification Severity Classification
description: Determines the severity level (CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW) for events classified as Notification. When is always NOW — when someone documents an event in Iris, the event exists now. Lead time and delivery scheduling are Phase 3 (escalation) concerns, not classification concerns.

platform.description: Can anyone use the platform right now, or is everything unavailable?

options.label: Yes — complete outage
options.description: All services are down, nobody can work

options.label: No — some or all services work
options.description: At least part of the platform is still operational

security.text: Is this a security or compliance issue?
security.description: Does this involve unauthorized access, leaked data, or a compliance violation?

options.label: Yes — security or compliance
options.description: Data breach, compromised credentials, unauthorized access, or compliance violation

options.label: No
options.description: Not related to security or compliance

impact.text: Can users still do their work?
impact.description: Think about the affected users right now — can they complete their tasks?

options.label: No — they're blocked
options.description: Users cannot complete their tasks at all

options.label: Partially — it's degraded
options.description: Errors, slowness, or reduced quality — but they can still work

options.label: Yes — no impact on their work

blocked_scope.description: Estimate the scope — a broad group or a specific few?

options.label: Many users
options.description: A significant portion of the user base

options.label: A few users
options.description: Limited to specific users or teams

degraded_scope.description: Estimate the scope — a broad group or a specific few?

options.label: Many users
options.description: A significant portion of the user base

options.label: A few users
options.description: Limited to specific users or teams

action.text: Do users need to take action?
action.description: Is there something users must do themselves — like updating a setting or migrating data?

options.label: Yes — action required
options.description: Users need to change, update, or do something
